results.title: Cross-chain signature replay attack due to user-supplied domainSeparator and missing deadline check
results.reasoning: Yes. Audit finding #2 describes the exact issue: the Forwarder takes a user-supplied domainSeparator and uses it directly in _verifySig, enabling cross-contract/cross-chain EIP-712 signature replay. It references the same code path (Forwarder.execute -> _verifySig) and same mechanism (unvalidated/externally provided domain separator). While the vulnerability description also notes a missing deadline check (indefinite validity), which the audit does not mention, that is an orthogonal omission; the core cross-chain replay due to arbitrary domainSeparator is the same issue and would be fixed by computing/validating the domain separator on-chain. Thus, the main vulnerability is detected, though the audit omits the deadline aspect.
